apprunner.service.authenticationconfigur: Describes resources needed to authenticate access to some source repositories. The specific resource depends on the repository provider.

apprunner.service.authenticationconfigur.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that grants the App Runner service access to a source repository. It's required for ECR image repositories (but not for ECR Public repositories).
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the App Runner connection that enables the App Runner service to connect to a source repository. It's required for GitHub code repositories.
